title: iberis ciliata subsp. vinetorum
intro: Iberis ciliata subsp. vinetorum, also known as Rock Rose or Alpine Cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, Rock Rose has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Rock Rose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and herbal medicine.
